name: @shieldpass/sdk
description: JavaScript/TypeScript SDK for ShieldPass — ZK-Compliant P2P Escrow on Stellar

scripts.build: tsc && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); if(fs.existsSync('circuits/reusable_kyc/target/reusable_kyc.json')) fs.copyFileSync('circuits/reusable_kyc/target/reusable_kyc.json','dist/reusable_kyc.json'); else console.log('Skipping reusable_kyc.json copy as it does not exist.')"
